faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Edgewater, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Edgewater range from $350 to $550, depending on the size and location of the colony, accessibility, and complexity of the removal. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work, ensuring no surprises on your final bill.

faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Edgewater locations. Given the density of residential areas and proximity to schools and businesses along River Road, we prioritize urgent bee removal requests to ensure community safety. faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane removal and relocation methods to preserve bee populations, which are vital pollinators. Our technicians assess each situation individually and work with local beekeepers to relocate healthy colonies. In cases where relocation isn't feasible due to safety concerns or colony health, we use targeted treatments as a last resort.

faqs.question: Are bee removal services safe for high-rise buildings in Edgewater?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our team is specially trained and equipped to handle bee removal in Edgewater's many waterfront high-rises and multi-story buildings. We use safety harnesses, specialized equipment, and coordinate with building management to ensure safe access and removal without disrupting residents or damaging property.
